title: oqs-cbg-pipeline: Numerical implementation of the Colla–Breuer–Gasbarri minimal-dissipation effective-Hamiltonian framework
description:
Sail-internal repository implementing and benchmarking the currently validated surface of the Colla-Breuer-Gasbarri effective-Hamiltonian construction for non-Markovian open quantum systems under the Hayden-Sorce minimal-dissipation gauge. DG-1 has passed (2026-04-30); DG-2 structural sub-claims have passed under the Council-cleared displacement-profile registry (2026-05-04); DG-4 has passed at D1 v0.1.2 (2026-05-06) via picture-fixed Path B numerical L_4 extraction with all four reproducibility perturbations operational and the result JSON audit-complete (the v0.1.1 PASS verdict tagged v0.5.0 was superseded on review the same day). The literal analytic fourth-order K_2-K_4 recursion (Path A), DG-3 cross-method failure-asymmetry-clearance, and DG-5 thermodynamic discriminant remain pending. Anchored to Council-cleared Breakwater Ledger entry CL-2026-005 v0.4.

Outputs are coordinate-dependent under the chosen gauge. See docs/do_not_cite_as.md for citation prohibitions.
notes: Current metadata version 0.3.0.dev0. DG-1 PASS (2026-04-30). DG-2 structural sub-claims PASS under the Council-cleared displacement-profile registry (2026-05-04). DG-4 PASS at D1 v0.1.2 (2026-05-06) via picture-fixed Path B numerical L_4 extraction; supersedes the v0.1.1 PASS verdict tagged v0.5.0 that was downgraded on review the same day. The literal analytic fourth-order K_2-K_4 recursion (Path A), DG-3 cross-method failure-asymmetry-clearance, and DG-5 thermodynamic discriminant remain pending. Live DG status: docs/validity_envelope.md.
